reviews.review_description:
Actors isn’t just a game—it’s a love letter to filmmaking, wrapped in a hilariously immersive VR experience. Step into the shoes of a struggling actor clawing their way back, guided by your agent through the chaotic, exhilarating world of movie production. From rehearsals to shooting day, you’ll interact with a full crew (boom op, clapper loader, director—the works!), bringing each scene to life in glorious, unscripted chaos.
The real magic? The game mirrors real filmmaking—scenes aren’t shot chronologically, scripts are fluid, and you can stick to the lines or improvise like a true method actor. Watch your performance come together in the final cut, complete with all the bloopers and brilliance of a real shoot.
Early Access? Absolutely—but it already feels like a must-play. The potential is massive, and the attention to detail (from set dynamics to voice acting) is staggering. If you’ve ever dreamed of stepping onto a movie set, this is your backstage pass. 10/10—Hollywood in VR has never been this fun!

reviews.review_title: Most Innovative VR Game Of The Year
reviews.review_description:
This is the most innovative VR game that has been released this year. You play as an actor, and you have to say your lines when it's your turn to talk, and then you can rematch the entire scene later. It's not as hard as I thought it would be. I thought you would literally have to remember your lines word for word, but luckily, you don't. The words pop up.

The fun mostly comes from you acting out the scenes and watching the scenes after. Hearing yourself and seeing yourself act is great fun.

My only complaint is that there isn't that much of a story it's more of a movie actor simulator, which is good, but I was hoping for a story outside of acting. You play like ten scenes, and it just ends, but there is still more to come!

Also, the snap turning was a bit stiff and unresponsive. You can get around it, but it's something I noticed. 

Overall, it's a really fun game that you won't find anywhere else. It's a game you could play with friends and family and have a really good time.

Such a fun game even in early access! One thing for the devs it would be so cool if you could add more of a story behind acting where you have to like physically walk to each set or something like that and like maybe like your journey to winning an Oscar or something would be super cool. But overall, this game is so much fun and can’t wait for what’s in store next !￼

The game of course just came out so I wasn’t expecting too much but it was really fun and I hope the devs continue to work on it so it can improve in the future. I would suggest maybe not making it to where the user has to kinda rush the lines and instead just implement a system that doesn’t speak back until the line is finished. Also I know it would take a lot to add more films but maybe you can make the new ones like a third or a quarter of the length as the first one so you can technically make more with the same amount of effort. I would just love to see an eventual career mode implemented but for now this game has great bones.

Just bought this game and was really excited to play, I start the first rehearsal and he tells me to say okay. I can see the wave format from me speaking. He keeps telling me to say okay nice and loud, after screaming okay for twenty minutes without it working I almost threw my headset away. Not sure what’s wrong. Not happy.

developer_response.body:
We are really sorry you are having trouble with the game. Please check your internet connection, as the game requires it for speech-to-text recognition. Also, please check if your microphone is working and has been enabled for the game (the game is supposed to ask for permission during the first launch). 

If you have checked both and still see a red exclamation mark on the teleprompter, it likely indicates a temporary issue with the speech recognition service. In that case, please open the in-game menu (press the Y button) to skip the QTA sequence, or try again later. Thank you for your patience!

We have uploaded fix that addresses this issue. Please try again and let us know.

reviews.review_title: A lot of potential but bland
reviews.review_description: I know this game just came out but I finished the only movie available and was disappointed that you aren’t able to actually watch the film after you make it. I was hoping to sit in the theater and watch what I put together but as of now it’s only acting bts. Love the idea of this but it’s going to need more to bring me back

On checking reviews lots have been having the same issues. I deleted the game and it says cannot get a refund yet played for less than 2 hours….  Don’t bother.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry you have troubles with the game. We have uploaded fix today - it is fixing speech recognition for some users. Please try again and let us know.

reviews.review_title: Great game, a few wishes for the devs
reviews.review_description: First I want to say this game is great even in its earliest form I belive this is gonna be the next big game, it helps people who want to act or just for fun but I wish the scenes shot in order and if rehearsals were longer because no ones gonna go to a studio for 5 minutes and more movies would be awesome but overall great game worth every penny

This is a great game even when it still new, this game got so much potential like they could add more scenes for HellCab to complete the movie then you could watch the whole movie with it being edited with vfx and sfx and they could add more movies to act in, also fix the voice volume so the mic can hear you easier. Then there could be oscars, and other rewards, and do patch updates, and you can go to the movie theater to watch the movie you made and when you wanna restart or if the director tells you to restart you don’t have your screen go black instead director says like take it from the top and yall reset and walk back and to your places or if you wanna restart you can be like “can we take it from the top” so you don’t have to keep clicking restart. Then you can get paid and the person that is Benedikt is like the main person is like the main person the game focus on and as you do more movies you get more famous and you can do animated movies too. But I really love this game and the potential it has. One more thing there should be sequels to some movies if the movies seems like there should be a sequel. And you should be able to go to your trailer and like get dressed for the movies  and like you can eat in there and etc, and you could walk and drive around the city and you  have a phone for your agent to call you to tell you if you’re doing a new movie and you could have your own house to live in, then you can be able to buy more houses and more cars, ok that it.

reviews.review_title: Great game but needs more movies!
reviews.review_description: It's an awesome game and I love the acting! It really gives you the feeling that you are casted in a movie and is an actor. BUT, it would definitely be a much better game if it had more movies. Hellcab was great, but please add more movies!

I Had Lots Of Fun With This Game, And I Thought That When I Finished The First Movie, I Could Do More, But When I Finished "Hellcab" It Felt Like a Short Tech Demo. I Thougt That I Could Do More Movies Or See The Final Result after post. Other Than That Great Game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for review. We are working on it!

reviews.review_description: I wanted to give this title more stats and I hope in time I can. It's a great concept and something original and different than anything else on the meta store. You act out scenes and there is a story of the character/protagonist and the director..its exactly what it says it is. An acting simulation. There is a lot of potential here and I hope things expand. In early access currently there is only one movie to film and once finished you don't get to watch it. I hope when it's released in full there are more movies to act in and your able to actually watch the movie once it's done filming. Character customization would go a long way too. It's a great start and the price is fair. I hope the devs are able to deliver more content and the combat is a bit janky. I hope to see that be smoother and more ability to interact with the environment.

The game is amazing. 
The game can help prepare you for Hollywood.Even though the game is good,the voice thing is very scuffed. It takes a while for the AI,or whatever it is,to pick up my voice. But if you brush that off it has high

it just looks like a scam , i bought the game at the release and finished it in 1 hour and the game has been already out for an entire month and still no updates , for now i don’t recommand it’s just a cashgrab scam

developer_response.body: Hello, we are sorry to hear it. We are working on it. Meantime you can play as other characters in the scene or make entire scene in Party Mode.

reviews.review_description: Just got this game and was excited to play! But when the man said to so OK nice and loud I was yelling it for twenty minutes and nothing happened, so I just had to skip. Also I hope that whenever this game gets updated PLEASE ADD MORE SCENES or another movie 🍿

Rehearse a scene, and then act it out, and then replay it from the POV of the camera, or even upload it to the PC app.
All in quite realistic setting of high budget movie production, with a bit of an overarching story of the actor, and director who does not seem to like him for some reason.
Great experience for trying out to be movie star, and also quite useful tool for practicing acting.
I cannot wait for more content and especially for PCVR version, where this thing can reach it's full potential with modding and workshop, with custom scenes or even movies.

One thing that's slightly hit or miss is the voice recognition - which is luckily just in the rehearsal part, but that itself seems like a bit weird design decision - the thing that really matters is the scene, and the voice recognition could be more useful as a post recording thing rather than real time mechanic, like for example the director could give you some feedback on the line delivery, and other quirks of your acting, after replaying the scene, or something like that, rather than the voice recognition being just gates you need to pass to complete the rehearsal and the story bits around it.

And of course there is few more things that could be improved, but for the current price - it's a bargain, and it's still Early Access, so things will improve over time, but even with that, it's already quite complete and unique product.

reviews.review_title: Fun experience but janky still in EA
reviews.review_description: I think its a really cool idea and I had a lot of laughs in the hour I spent with it, but its not really finished, there are only 10 scenes to act out and some of those are really really short scenes and there is no online functionality, snap turning only and it kinda bugs out and doesnt always work. I would say if you like this idea buy it and support them so they keep going but be warned its not polished. That being said the lines are very well done by the voice actors your acting with and there is a lot of humor in the dialog with the director (often making the practice scenes more fun then anything) You can find my video on YT as well as at least one other good video if you want to see it in action.
Love the game but the rendering tool on the pc isnt working for me at all. Be amazing to get that working to get the full experience of the film aftermath.

developer_response.body: Please contact us via Discord (recommended), www.actorsgame.com form, or email agent@actorsgame.com so we can help you. Basically you need to be on same wifi (headset and the PC) and then you need to write IP address and port from PC app to headset.

reviews.review_description: A very original VR experience where you act inside a movie. Fun, immersive, and already very enjoyable in Early Access. A unique concept with great potential!

This game would be great with more combat qte and yes I love action movies ALOT

developer_response.body:
We are really sorry you are having trouble with the game. Please check your internet connection, as the game requires it for speech-to-text recognition. Also, please check if your microphone is working and has been enabled for the game (the game is supposed to ask for permission during the first launch). 

If you have checked both and still see a red exclamation mark on the teleprompter, it likely indicates a temporary issue with the internet or speech recognition service. In that case, please open the in-game menu (press the Y button) to skip the QTA sequence, or try again later. But it is no most likely your case. We do not register any issue with speech to text in time your review was written.

We have upload version that addresses this issue. Please try and let us know.

Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
This game is the ultimate way to act for anyone who’s up for a new challenge, and as training for anyone who’d want to be an actor or voice actor, I’ll explain down below.


I’m a starting voice actor, wanted to be one since childhood, recently got my first role so take it from me, this gem here is perfect for acting practice and more, when I came across this game/sim, I didn’t expect it to be what I hoped it to be, but boy was I wrong, you’re thrown into the deep end, straight to rehearsals, the game guides you very well on what to do, where to be, and what to say, the thing you have to find out for yourself, is the acting within these things, the way you bring emotion in a fitting way with the scenes you do, it will quickly make you realise, there’s alot of angles you can try out, and the meta quest microphone isnt the best, you might want to get a good microphone attachment, but you don’t need it per se.

All in all, this is an amazing experience, with more stories planned in the future , I can’t wait to work on my acting in the most fun way imaginable, actually being there with the crew, this is a must buy
This game makes me feel like a real actor. The only thing is that the game doesn't pick up your voice to well but it works. It's also super duper fun and cheap!
Rubbish would like a. Refund Asdp very poor game avoid
It’s good but it just needs more movies and scenes
